title: Little Brak vegetation fire: firefighting efforts continue
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has said crews from its Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services are continuing firefighting efforts at a vegetation fire near the railway line between Hartenbos and Little Brak River today, 4 January.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has said crews from its Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management Services are continuing firefighting efforts at a vegetation fire near the railway line between Hartenbos and Little Brak River today, 4 January."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The municipality said the fire broke out on the afternoon of 3 January and that firefighting operations have been hampered by inaccessible terrain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"By the evening of 3 January, firefighters were working at the head of the fire to extinguish flames while other teams focused on hotspots,\" it said.","html":"\"By the evening of 3 January, firefighters were working at the head of the fire to extinguish flames while other teams focused on hotspots,\" it said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Overnight into 4 January, crews continued monitoring the fire. It was reported that there was no safe vehicle access to the fire line,\" said the municipality.","html":"\"Overnight into 4 January, crews continued monitoring the fire. It was reported that there was no safe vehicle access to the fire line,\" said the municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It said efforts were made to secure the blaze along Hartland’s northern boundary, however the terrain remains difficult to navigate.","html":"It said efforts were made to secure the blaze along Hartland’s northern boundary, however the terrain remains difficult to navigate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Winds have further complicated suppression efforts. As of the morning of 4 January, the head of the fire was located near the north-eastern side of the Hartland fence, with flames still burning on the southern side above the railway line.\"","html":"\"Winds have further complicated suppression efforts. As of the morning of 4 January, the head of the fire was located near the north-eastern side of the Hartland fence, with flames still burning on the southern side above the railway line.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It said firefighting crews remain at the scene.","html":"It said firefighting crews remain at the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Watch a video of the scene on the Mossel Bay Municipality's Facebook page here.","html":"Watch a video of the scene on the Mossel Bay Municipality's Facebook page here."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
